name: Malmok Beach
description: Quieter than resort beaches; good coral formations; occasional sea glass found by beachcombers.

rockiness.beach: Rocky shoreline with sandy patches between limestone 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Reef patches close to shore; depth increases over coral 🪸

characteristics.depth_profile: Rocky shoreline with reef patches close in; depth increases over coral within 20–50 m.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Moderate to extensive — rocky coast with sandy patches
characteristics.access: Free roadside parking between Palm Beach and Boca Catalina
fun_facts: Quieter than resort beaches; good coral formations; occasional sea glass found by beachcombers.
